# Simulation

**Summary**: The use of computational tools to model and analyze the behavior of electronic circuits.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1997-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 1997]] used simulation to evaluate the performance of multiphase sinusoidal oscillators and universal filters.
